workoutDetails.name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Warm up properly before starting the exercise
Position the barbell on your shoulders
Lower your body by bending your knees and hips
Go down until your thighs are parallel to the ground
Push through your heels to return to starting position
tips: Keep your chest up and core tight
Don't let your knees cave inward
Maintain a neutral spine
Use full range of motion for best results

workoutDetails.name: Downward Dog
instructions: Start on your hands and knees
Spread your fingers wide and press into the ground
Push your hips up toward the ceiling
Form an inverted V-shape with your body
Hold the position and breathe deeply
tips: This is a great stretch for hamstrings and shoulders
Press your hands firmly into the mat
Keep your head neutral between your arms
Hold for 30 seconds to 1 minute

workoutDetails.name: Warrior I
instructions: Step one foot forward into a lunge position
Square your hips forward to the mat
Raise your arms overhead with palms facing each other
Sink deeper into the front leg bend
Hold for 5-8 breaths then repeat on other side
tips: Keep your front knee aligned over your ankle
Press your back foot firmly into the ground
Engage your core for stability
Open your chest toward the front of the mat

workoutDetails.name: Warrior II
instructions: Stand with feet wide apart about 4 feet distance
Turn your front foot out 90 degrees and back foot 45 degrees
Raise your arms out to the sides at shoulder height
Bend your front knee over your ankle
Gaze forward over your front fingertips
tips: Keep your weight evenly distributed between both feet
Your front knee should track over your second toe
Relax your shoulders down and back
Hold for 30 seconds to 1 minute per side

workoutDetails.name: Tree Pose
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other leg bent
Place your bent leg's foot on your inner thigh
Press your palms together at your chest or raise them overhead
Fix your gaze on a single point ahead
Breathe deeply and hold the pose
tips: Engage your standing leg to stay balanced
If you lose balance, simply reset and try again
Press your foot firmly into your thigh
Keep your hips level and facing forward

workoutDetails.name: Child's Pose
instructions: Start on your hands and knees
Bring your big toes together and spread your knees wide
Sit your hips back to your heels
Extend your arms forward and rest your forehead on the mat
Breathe deeply and relax
tips: This is a restful pose good for recovery
You can place a pillow under your forehead for comfort
Keep your arms relaxed or extended
Hold for 1-5 minutes

workoutDetails.name: Camel Pose
instructions: Start in a kneeling position with knees hip-width apart
Place your hands on your lower back for support
Gently arch your back and press your hips forward
Slowly drop your head back
Hold and breathe deeply
tips: Keep your hips stacked over your knees
Don't force your head back, let gravity help
Engage your core to protect your lower back
Hold for 15-30 seconds

workoutDetails.name: Running
instructions: Find a safe, flat running path
Warm up with a 5-minute walk or light jog
Maintain a steady pace that feels comfortable
Focus on your breathing and form
Cool down with a 5-minute walk
tips: Land on your midfoot, not your heels
Keep your arms at 90 degrees
Run at a conversational pace
Stay hydrated before and after

workoutDetails.name: Push-ups
instructions: Start in a plank position
Place your hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the ground
Push back up to starting position
Keep your body in a straight line
tips: Engage your core throughout the movement
Don't let your hips sag
Control the descent
Modify by doing push-ups on your knees if needed

workoutDetails.name: Plank Hold
instructions: Start in a forearm plank position
Keep your body straight from head to heels
Engage your core muscles
Hold the position for 30-60 seconds
Rest and repeat for multiple sets
tips: This exercise builds core strength
Don't let your hips drop
Keep your head neutral
Breathe steadily throughout

workoutDetails.name: Box Jumps
instructions: Stand facing a stable elevated box or step
Bend your knees and swing your arms back
Explosively jump onto the box
Stand up fully on the box
Step down carefully and repeat
tips: Start with a lower box height
Focus on explosive power
Land softly on the balls of your feet
Rest adequately between sets
